title: Stocks are higher, boosted by chipmakers and strong earnings: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock markets rose on Tuesday, driven primarily by gains in chipmaker stocks as investors focused on corporate earnings. Despite ongoing geopolitical tensions related to the Iran conflict, market sentiment remained positive.
content: Stocks climbed on Tuesday, supported by chipmakers, as investors looked through the latest developments in the Iran war to focus on corporate earnings updates.

zh.title: 股票上涨，芯片制造商和强劲收益推动：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股市周二上涨，主要由芯片制造商股票的涨幅推动，投资者关注公司收益。尽管伊朗冲突相关地缘政治紧张局势持续，市场情绪保持积极。

title: The co-founder of Stocktwits dumped chip stocks before their 20% slide. Where he’s putting his money now.
summary: Stocktwits co-founder Howard Lindzon avoided losses by selling chip stocks ahead of a 20% market decline. He discusses where he's finding investment opportunities in the current economic environment.
content: Stocktwits’ Howard Lindzon talks to MarketWatch about sidestepping a chip selloff, where he sees opportunity and the “degenerate economy.”

zh.title: Stocktwits联合创始人在芯片股下跌20%之前抛售了芯片股。他现在把钱投向哪里。
zh.summary: Stocktwits联合创始人霍华德·林德桑通过在市场下跌20%之前出售芯片股来避免损失。他讨论了他在当前经济环境中寻找投资机会的地方。

title: How to successfully deal with a micromanaging boss
summary: This article provides guidance on strategies for managing relationships with micromanaging supervisors. The piece addresses workplace dynamics and professional development in the modern business environment.
content: Plus: Don’t Short Yourself has some exciting news.

zh.title: 如何成功地应对微管理老板
zh.summary: 本文提供了与微管理上司管理关系的策略指导。该文章涉及现代商业环境中的工作场所动态和职业发展。

title: Greer hints new Trump tariffs coming on dozens of countries: 'Expect action soon'
summary: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer signaled that the Trump administration plans to impose new tariffs on multiple countries in the near future. The announcement comes as existing tariff duties are set to expire.
content: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer's comments the Trump administration could impose new tariffs just as other duties are set to expire.

zh.title: 格里尔暗示特朗普对数十个国家的新关税即将出台：'预计很快采取行动'
zh.summary: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔表示，特朗普政府计划在不久的将来对多个国家征收新关税。这一宣布是在现有关税即将到期之际做出的。

title: If timing the stock market were easy, the Iran war would have proven it. It’s done the opposite.
summary: Market timing remains extraordinarily difficult, with active investors failing to outperform the broad market even during volatile periods like the Iran conflict. Historical data consistently shows that active stock picking cannot overcome basic mathematical disadvantages.
content: Active stock pickers almost always lose against the broad market. They can’t beat simple math.

zh.title: 如果股市择时很容易，伊朗战争就已经证明了这一点。它证明了相反的情况。
zh.summary: 市场择时仍然极其困难，即使在伊朗冲突等波动时期，主动投资者也未能跑赢大盘。历史数据一致表明，主动选股无法克服基本的数学劣势。

title: Nebius stock surges as Nvidia discloses 9.3% stake in neocloud
summary: Nebius stock rose sharply following Nvidia's disclosure of a 9.3% stake in the neocloud provider. Nvidia committed to a $2 billion investment in the company, signaling confidence in its cloud infrastructure position.
content: Nvidia said it would invest $2 billion into Nebius in March.

zh.title: 英伟达披露在云计算公司的9.3%股份后，Nebius股票飙升
zh.summary: 在英伟达披露其在云计算提供商中持有9.3%股份后，Nebius股票大幅上涨。英伟达承诺向该公司投资20亿美元，表明其对其云基础设施地位的信心。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
summary: Financial commentator Jim Cramer outlines the top 10 factors investors should monitor in the stock market, with particular focus on semiconductor stocks and their market movements. The analysis highlights key drivers of near-term market trends.
content: Is this an SK Hynix market?

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默：周二股市需要关注的十大要点
zh.summary: 财经评论员吉姆·克莱默列举了投资者应该关注的股市十大因素，特别强调了半导体股票及其市场动向。该分析突出了近期市场趋势的关键驱动因素。

title: Welcome to the ‘Roaring ’20s’: Here’s how this earnings season will keep the bull market strong
summary: Market analysts suggest this earnings season will sustain the current bull market, drawing parallels to the economic optimism of the 1920s. Investment experts recommend maintaining exposure to artificial intelligence and technology stocks.
content: Stay with the AI trade and overweight technology stocks, according to one earnings expert.

zh.title: 欢迎进入"咆哮的20年代"：本季度财报将如何保持牛市强势
zh.summary: 市场分析师认为本季度财报将维持当前的牛市，并与1920年代的经济乐观情绪进行类比。投资专家建议保持对人工智能和科技股票的敞口。

title: Time to buy the dip in momentum stocks after a punishing July drawdown? Here’s what history tells us.
summary: Following July's sharp decline in momentum stocks, historical data suggests investors with higher risk tolerance may find buying opportunities. Market history indicates that short-term volatility often precedes gains for patient investors.
content: Investors who can stomach a little short-term volatility are often rewarded.

zh.title: 七月暴跌后，是否是买入动量股票的好时机？历史怎么说
zh.summary: 在七月动量股票大幅下跌后，历史数据表明风险承受能力较高的投资者可能会找到买入机会。市场历史表明短期波动通常先于耐心投资者的收益。

title: Novo Nordisk sues Eli Lilly over ads as GLP-1 market hits ‘inflection point’
summary: Danish pharmaceutical company Novo Nordisk is suing competitor Eli Lilly over advertising practices in the rapidly growing GLP-1 drug market. Novo alleges that Lilly's advertisements lack current clinical data about its medications.
content: The Danish company Novo says U.S.-based Lilly isn’t including the most up-to-date clinical information about its drugs.

zh.title: 诺和诺德因广告起诉礼来制药，GLP-1市场迎来"拐点"
zh.summary: 丹麦制药公司诺和诺德因广告宣传问题起诉竞争对手礼来制药，该争议涉及快速增长的GLP-1药物市场。诺和诺德声称礼来的广告缺乏关于其药物的最新临床数据。

title: Ryanair broken window may have been caused by 'foreign object'
summary: A Ryanair flight experienced a critical incident when a cabin window broke, partially sucking a passenger out of the aircraft. Investigators are examining whether a foreign object caused the structural failure on the Boeing aircraft.
content: Passenger Ljubisa Karović was partially sucked out of a cabin window on the Boeing aircraft.

zh.title: 瑞安航空舷窗破裂可能由"异物"引起
zh.summary: 瑞安航空一航班发生严重事故，机舱舷窗破裂并部分吸出一名乘客。调查人员正在调查是否有异物导致了这架波音飞机的结构故障。

title: UBS hikes its year-end S&P 500 target to 8,100. Here's why
summary: Swiss banking giant UBS raised its year-end S&P 500 target to 8,100, suggesting significant upside remains in the market. The firm believes investors are underestimating the potential for an earnings-driven rally to continue.
content: Investors are still underestimating just how far the earnings driven rally has to go, according to the firm.

zh.title: 瑞银将年底标普500指数目标上调至8100，原因解析

title: U.S., China to hold AI talks in September, Reuters sources say
summary: The United States and China plan to conduct artificial intelligence discussions in September, representing a significant diplomatic outcome from the Trump-Xi summit in May. The talks are scheduled to occur before Xi's anticipated U.S. visit.
content: The talks, a significant outcome of the Trump-Xi summit in May, will likely take place before Xi's planned visit to the U.S. in September, the sources said.

zh.title: 美国与中国计划9月举行人工智能会谈

title: U.S. strikes Iran and Houthis threaten Saudi Arabia shipping as mediators push 10-day ceasefire
summary: The U.S. conducted strikes against Iran while Houthi forces threaten shipping in the Red Sea near Saudi Arabia. Regional mediators are advancing a 10-day ceasefire proposal between Washington and Tehran amid escalating regional tensions.
content: The latest cycle of strikes comes amid reports that regional mediators have presented Washington and Tehran with a proposal for a 10-day ceasefire.

zh.title: 美国打击伊朗，胡塞武装威胁沙特阿拉伯航运，调解人推进10天停火
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗进行了打击，而胡塞武装在沙特阿拉伯附近红海的航运中造成威胁。在地区紧张局势升级之际，地区调解人正在推动华盛顿与德黑兰之间的10天停火方案。

title: Intel's foundry lands first named customer under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, as Fortinet signs on for security chips
summary: Intel's foundry division secured its first announced customer under new CEO Lip-Bu Tan when Fortinet agreed to source security chips from the division. The contract marks a significant milestone for Intel's manufacturing ambitions since Tan took over in March 2025.
content: Fortinet is the first announced corporate customer for Intel's foundry under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, who took over the chipmaker in March 2025.

zh.title: 在CEO Lip-Bu Tan领导下，英特尔晶圆代工业务获得第一个公开客户，Fortinet签署安全芯片订单
zh.summary: 在新任CEO Lip-Bu Tan的领导下，英特尔晶圆代工部门获得了第一个公开宣布的客户，Fortinet同意从该部门采购安全芯片。这份合同标志着自Tan在2025年3月接任以来，英特尔制造野心的重要里程碑。

title: Boeing and Airbus prepare for next narrow-body battle – but airlines aren’t pushing for new jets yet
summary: Two major aircraft manufacturers are developing new narrow-body jets, but demand remains subdued as airlines prioritize current production, deliveries and existing aircraft operations.
content: Boeing and Airbus are preparing their next narrow-body jets, but airlines and investors remain focused on production, deliveries and current aircraft.

title: VAT to be cut from household electricity bills in October
summary: The UK government will reduce VAT on household electricity bills starting in October, providing an estimated £45 annual savings per home as part of policy announced during Andy Burnham's first full day as prime minister.
content: Homes will save around £45 a year through the cut announced on Andy Burnham's first full day as prime minister.

title: Jamie Dimon says he wouldn’t buy Treasurys. ‘I don’t understand the upside.’
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, who runs one of the U.S. Treasury's primary dealers, expressed skepticism about American Treasury securities, citing unclear upside potential.
content: Jamie Dimon — long considered a potential candidate to be treasury secretary, and the person in charge of one of the nation’s primary dealers of Treasury securities — says he wouldn’t buy American debt.

title: UK government borrowing lower than expected in June

summary: Citi analysts maintain a 10,000 price target for South Korea's Kospi index, suggesting a potential 50% recovery from recent lows and reflecting confidence in market rebound.

summary: Escalating U.S.-Iran tensions are keeping Middle East oil prices elevated, reigniting inflation concerns as analysts reassess commodity market impacts and geopolitical risk premiums.

summary: Wall Street analysts project General Motors will report adjusted earnings per share of $3.20 and revenue of $47.01 billion in its upcoming earnings announcement.

zh.summary: 华尔街分析师预计通用汽车将在即将公布的财报中报告调整后每股收益为3.20美元，营收为470.1亿美元。

title: Your healthcare could now cost $185,500 in retirement — and that doesn’t include long-term care
summary: Rising healthcare costs and chronic disease management expenses have pushed estimated retirement healthcare costs to $185,500, excluding long-term care, underscoring growing financial burdens for retirees.
content: Rising prices for care and managing chronic conditions helped drive up the forecast.

zh.title: 退休医疗费用或高达18.55万美元——还不包括长期护理
zh.summary: 不断上升的医疗费用和慢性病管理成本已将退休医疗费用推升至18.55万美元，不包括长期护理，凸显了退休者面临的日益增加的财务负担。

title: Dimitri de Vreeze helped build DSM’s materials business. Then he had to sell it
summary: DSM-Firmenich CEO Dimitri de Vreeze reflects on the difficult decision to divest the materials business after 30+ years at the company, emphasizing how the strategic choice reshaped his understanding of success.
content: After more than three decades at science-based firm DSM, Dimitri de Vreeze faced what he calls the hardest decision of his career: selling the materials business where he had grown up professionally. In this episode of "Executive Decisions," the DSM-Firmenich CEO reflects on why the decision made strategic sense, even as it felt deeply personal, and how it shaped his view that success is not a finish line.

zh.title: 迪米特里·德·弗里泽帮助建立了DSM的材料业务。后来他不得不出售它
zh.summary: DSM-Firmenich首席执行官迪米特里·德·弗里泽反思了在该公司工作30多年后做出的艰难决定——出售材料业务，强调这一战略举措如何改变了他对成功的理解。

title: Ships shun Strait of Hormuz as renewed fighting strains key oil corridor
summary: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has declined significantly following Trump's blockade implementation last week, impacting a critical global oil corridor. The slowdown could affect global energy prices and shipping patterns. This reflects geopolitical tensions affecting essential energy infrastructure.
content: Vessel traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has slumped since U.S. President Donald Trump's blockade took effect last week.

zh.title: 船只避开霍尔木兹海峡 新爆发的战斗加剧关键石油走廊压力
zh.summary: 上周特朗普实施封锁后，通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量大幅下降，冲击了全球关键石油走廊。这一放缓可能影响全球能源价格和航运模式。这反映了影响关键能源基础设施的地缘政治紧张局势。

title: U.S. condemns China's 'dangerous and aggressive' acts after Philippine sailor injured at disputed shoal
summary: A Philippine sailor was injured at a disputed shoal, prompting U.S. condemnation of China's actions. The incident occurs amid regional diplomatic meetings involving Southeast Asian and Chinese officials. The flare-up reflects ongoing territorial tensions in the region.
content: The flare-up came before Rubio is expected to visit Manila for meetings of Southeast Asian foreign ministers, with Chinese diplomat Wang Yi also in attendance.

zh.title: 菲律宾水手在争议浅滩受伤后 美国谴责中国"危险且咄咄逼人"的行为
zh.summary: 一名菲律宾水手在争议浅滩处受伤，引发美国谴责中国的行为。该事件发生在涉及东南亚和中国官员的地区外交会议期间。这次升级反映了该地区持续存在的领土紧张关系。

title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
summary: The Trump administration has imposed 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, marking a significant escalation in North American trade tensions. Canada has vowed to intensify trade negotiations in response. The move threatens to disrupt bilateral economic relations between the neighbors.
content: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.

zh.title: 特朗普对加拿大征收50%关税 卡尼誓言"加强"贸易谈判
zh.summary: 特朗普政府对加拿大商品征收50%关税，标志着北美贸易紧张局势的重大升级。加拿大已承诺加强贸易谈判作为回应。此举威胁到两个邻国之间的双边经济关系。

title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
summary: The Trump administration announced 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods, citing discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against U.S. automobiles, dairy, and alcohol industries. The tariffs represent a major policy shift targeting perceived trade imbalances. This escalates ongoing North American trade disputes.
content: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. automobile, dairy and alcohol industries.

zh.title: 美国对加拿大实施严厉新关税，加剧贸易紧张局势
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布对某些加拿大商品征收50%的关税，理由是渥太华对美国汽车、乳制品和酒精产业的歧视性贸易行为。这些关税代表了针对感知到的贸易失衡的重大政策转变。这加剧了正在进行的北美贸易争端。
